projectDescription: Backend API for managing lottery ticket sales, draws, commissions, and payment tracking with hierarchical RBAC and real-time analytics
keyFeatures: JWT-based authentication with role-based access control (ADMIN, VENTANA, VENDEDOR)
Hierarchical lottery ticket management with Banca → Ventana → Vendedor structure
Automated sorteo (draw) scheduling and lifecycle management (SCHEDULED → OPEN → CLOSED → EVALUATED)
Flexible commission system with JSON policies and priority-based resolution
Real-time sales analytics and financial exposure tracking with dashboard APIs
Restriction rules for betting limits with temporal and hierarchical enforcement
Configurable multipliers with user/ventana overrides and snapshot immutability
Payment tracking for winning tickets with partial payments and reversal support
Transaction-safe ticket creation with deadlock handling and retry mechanisms
Comprehensive activity logging and audit trail for all critical operations
Costa Rica timezone (GMT-6) handling with UTC storage and local display
Redis caching for performance optimization with automatic cache warming
Automated jobs for sorteo automation, account settlements, and monthly closures
publicApiSurface: POST /api/v1/auth/login - Authenticate user and obtain JWT tokens
POST /api/v1/auth/refresh - Refresh access token using refresh token
POST /api/v1/tickets - Create lottery ticket with jugadas (bets)
GET /api/v1/tickets - List tickets with RBAC filtering and pagination
GET /api/v1/tickets/:id - Get ticket details with jugadas and payment status
POST /api/v1/tickets/:id/cancel - Cancel ticket with audit trail
POST /api/v1/tickets/:id/pay - Register payment for winning ticket
POST /api/v1/sorteos - Create new sorteo (draw)
GET /api/v1/sorteos - List sorteos with filters (status, loteria, date range)
PATCH /api/v1/sorteos/:id/open - Transition sorteo to OPEN state
PATCH /api/v1/sorteos/:id/close - Transition sorteo to CLOSED state
PATCH /api/v1/sorteos/:id/evaluate - Evaluate sorteo with winning number
POST /api/v1/loterias - Create lottery with rulesJson configuration
GET /api/v1/loterias/:id/preview_schedule - Preview scheduled sorteos
POST /api/v1/loterias/:id/seed_sorteos - Generate sorteos from schedule
GET /api/v1/ventas/summary - Sales summary with commission and payment metrics
GET /api/v1/ventas/breakdown - Sales breakdown by dimension (ventana, loteria, vendedor)
GET /api/v1/ventas/timeseries - Time-series sales data with hourly/daily granularity
GET /api/v1/admin/dashboard - Dashboard KPIs with alerts and comparisons
GET /api/v1/admin/dashboard/timeseries - Time-series analytics for dashboard
GET /api/v1/admin/dashboard/exposure - Financial exposure analysis by number
POST /api/v1/restrictions - Create restriction rules with hierarchical priority
GET /api/v1/restrictions - List restriction rules with filtering
PUT /api/v1/bancas/:id/commission-policy - Set commission policy for banca
PUT /api/v1/ventanas/:id/commission-policy - Set commission policy for ventana
PUT /api/v1/users/:id/commission-policy - Set commission policy for user
POST /api/v1/multipliers - Create loteria multiplier
GET /api/v1/multipliers - List multipliers with filters
POST /api/v1/multiplier-overrides - Create user multiplier override
GET /api/v1/activity-logs - Get activity logs with search and filtering
GET /api/v1/accounts/statements - List account statements
POST /api/v1/accounts/payments - Record account payment
POST /api/v1/cierres - Trigger manual account closing
